channel.title: Gnupg is missing and cannot be installed
channel.description: So gnupg is gone for im assuming reasons, ok. But when i try to install it with sudo apt install gnupg or sudo apt install gnupg2 the installer claims successful but there is no software on the machine or at-least i cannot see any.

item.title: Gnupg is missing and cannot be installed
item.dc:creator: arraybolt3
item.description:
gnupg is a command-line application. Try running gpg --version.

You’re probably looking for GNU Privacy Assistant (GPA), which was unfortunately removed because Debian Trixie dropped it. See:

Whonix Forum – 31 Jul 25

GNU Privacy Assistant (GPA)

Development

Unfortunately, GPA will have to be removed from Whonix 18, as it has been removed from Debian Trixie due to lack of maintenance. See Debian Package Tracker, https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=1089914. The suggested replacement,...

The current recommended GPG frontend is KGpg. The link below describes how to install it and explains why it is not installed by default.

Kicksecure – 3 Jan 26

Software Recommendations

Software Recommendations by Kicksecure for Encryption, E-Mail, IRC, Media-Player, Image Viewer, Screenshot Creator, Calculator, Office Suite and more

Read full topic
item.source: Gnupg is missing and cannot be installed

item.title: Gnupg is missing and cannot be installed
item.dc:creator: shaylabeige
item.description:
So gnupg is gone for im assuming reasons, ok. But when i try to install it with sudo apt install gnupg or sudo apt install gnupg2 the installer claims successful but there is no software on the machine or at-least i cannot see any.

Read full topic
item.source: Gnupg is missing and cannot be installed
